semantic.role: Vitest test suite for the dependency-graph engine, verifying graph construction from mock Spine units.
responsibilities: Creates temporary directories for each test to isolate file writes.
Defines test helpers (`writeSpineUnit`, `writeSpineUnit`) to write mock Spine unit JSON files into the temp directory.
Tests that `buildGraph` correctly builds a dependency graph by scanning a directory of Spine unit files and counting expected nodes.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test via `afterEach`.
outOfScope: No production logic; entirely test infrastructure.
Does not define or export any public API for consumption by other modules.
invariants: Test file must end with `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts` (rule `test-file-suffix`). The file is assumed to satisfy this (e.g., `dependency-graph.test.ts`).
Each test must clean up temporary directories to avoid side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a test suite ensuring the dependency-graph engine correctly parses Spine units and builds a directed graph of module imports.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent provided; this appears to be a new or unchanged test file.
